item.title: SECOND NATURE BRAND: SECOND NATURE KETO CRUNCH SMART MIX, 10-ounce retail-sized plastic pouch, Recall
item.product: SECOND NATURE KETO CRUNCH SMART MIX, 10-ounce retail-sized plastic pouch,
item.summary: The product may contain undeclared allergens (cashews, pistachios), and dried cherries. Product details: SECOND NATURE KETO CRUNCH SMART MIX, 10-ounce retail-sized plastic pouch, UPC 077034013405, 6-10oz units per case.
item.affectedPeople: Distributed nationwide in retail stores and through online orders.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
